    What to expect

    Within 14 days of consistent use, most customers see a noticeable improvement in their dark spots.

     

    By the time they're 2-3 bars in, it's a day and night difference.

     

    We know everyone is different. So it may take you a bit longer to see results. That's why we recommend giving yourself at least a full bar to see a difference.

     

    The best part is, results only get better each day you use it!

     

    We truly believe in the power of our Superfood Soap, so if you don't see brighter skin, just email us for a full refund!

    Ingredients

    Ingredients for Brighter, Healthier Skin

     

    Kojic Acid – A natural compound derived from fermented rice and certain fungi. It works by inhibiting tyrosinase, the key enzyme that controls melanin production in the skin. By slowing melanin synthesis, Kojic Acid helps fade dark spots, age spots, acne scars, melasma, and uneven tone over time. It also provides mild antioxidant properties, protecting the skin from oxidative stress that can trigger new pigmentation.

     

    Turmeric Extract – A golden superfood rich in curcumin that helps fade discoloration, calm redness, and restore skin’s glow. Its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties support a bright, even complexion.

     

    Honey – A soothing humectant that draws moisture into the skin while offering natural antibacterial and healing benefits. Keeps the skin soft, hydrated, and radiant.

     

    Coconut Oil – Rich in lauric acid and natural fats that nourish, soften, and help protect the skin barrier from dryness.

     

    Olive Oil – Loaded with squalene and antioxidants that deeply moisturize and support smoother, more resilient skin.

     

    Shea Butter – A nutrient-rich emollient with vitamins A and E that replenish dry, irritated skin and strengthen its protective layer.

     

    Mango Butter – Abundant in vitamins A, C, and E, this creamy butter improves elasticity, helps reduce flakiness, and keeps skin supple.

     

    Lemon Oil – Provides natural vitamin C and citric acid that help gently exfoliate, brighten, and refresh dull skin.

     

    Collagen – Helps support the skin’s natural structure, improving firmness, hydration, and elasticity for a smoother look.

     

    Hyaluronic Acid – Binds up to 1,000 times its weight in water to deliver deep hydration and maintain plump, dewy skin.

     

    Tocopherol (Vitamin E) – A protective antioxidant that defends against free radicals and supports healthy skin barrier repair.

     

    Ascorbic Acid (Vitamin C) – Promotes collagen production and helps fade hyperpigmentation for brighter, more luminous skin.

     

    Retinol (Vitamin A) – Boosts cell turnover and helps smooth fine lines, refine texture, and even out tone.

     

    Lauric Acid & Myristic Acid – Gentle cleansing fatty acids derived from coconut that create a soft, creamy lather without over-drying.

     

    Glycerin – A natural humectant that keeps the skin hydrated and soft after cleansing.

     

    Propylene Glycol – Helps retain moisture and gives the bar its smooth, stable consistency.

     

    Sorbitol – A plant-based humectant that draws water into the skin, preventing tightness or dryness.

     

    Stearic Acid – A plant-derived fatty acid that provides structure and a creamy texture to the bar.

     

    Aqua (Water) – The essential base that activates cleansing and evenly distributes all ingredients.

    Results you love or your money back

    If you don’t love them at any time, for any reason, we will immediately refund you 💚

     

    Simply email us at support@stemandsoul.co within 60 days of receiving your order and we'll refund you immediately.
     

    No returns. No hoops to jump through. No hassle.

     

    We know everyone's skin is different, which is why we offer enough time for you to truly try it out, risk-free.

    FAQ

    What kind of dark spots does it help with?

    Our Superfood Soap is made to support clearer, more even-looking skin. It helps fade the appearance of many types of discoloration including dark spots, sun spots, age spots, melasma, hyperpigmentation, and uneven tone anywhere on the face and body. With consistent use, the brightening botanicals and nourishing superfoods in the formula gently but quickly support healthy skin renewal for a brighter, more radiant and even-toned complexion.

    How do I use it?

    Use it twice a day to cleanse. Once in the morning, once at night.

     

    Rinse your face or the area you're targeting: then lather on the soap for 10 seconds and let the lather sit for 20 seconds before rinsing.

     

    Just make sure to moisturize after use, and use sunscreen if you're going outside.

    Is it safe for sensitive skin?

    Yes, our formula is free from harsh chemicals and synthetic fragrances. Many customers with sensitive or eczema-prone skin love it, but as with any new product, patch test first.

    Is it good for oily skin?

    You bet. Kojic Acid and Turmeric both help balance excess oil while improving the look of dark spots and blemishes. Coconut Oil (rich in lauric acid) and Lemon Oil work to cleanse away buildup and impurities, while the soap’s natural butters keep skin hydrated without feeling greasy. Unlike harsh cleansers that strip natural oils and trigger more oil production, this formula gently clarifies while maintaining a healthy skin barrier, making it a great daily choice for oily or combination skin.

    Can it help with acne?

    Absolutely. What makes this soap different is that it tackles acne on four levels at once. Coconut Oil fights the bacteria that cause breakouts, Turmeric calms redness and swelling, Kojic Acid stops dark scars from forming, and rich superfoods keep your skin barrier strong instead of stripped. Together, that’s the Superfood Skin System — a unique way to clear existing blemishes while preventing new ones, leaving skin balanced, brighter, and healthier-looking with every wash.

    Can I use this soap on my body?

    Yes! Our formula is gentle enough for daily use on the face and body. Just avoid direct contact with your eyes.

    How soon will I see results?

    Every skin type is different, but many customers notice changes within the 3-5 days, then even more significant improvements in as little as 7-14 days. For best results, we recommend daily use for 4–6 weeks, combined with sunscreen on exposed areas.

    Will it dry out my skin?

    Nope. Unlike many soaps, ours is enriched with Shea Butter, Coconut Oil, Mango Butter, and Olive Oil to deeply nourish and hydrate, leaving your skin soft and smooth after every wash.

    How should I store the soap?

    Keep the bar dry between uses (on a soap dish or rack) to extend its life and prevent melting.

    When will I receive my order?

    Orders are shipped from our warehouse in Phoenix, Arizona and delivered within 3-5 days on average. 

     

    You'll receive a tracking number as soon as your order ships.

    Radiant, Spot-Free Skin With Superfood Soap

    Gently fade dark spots and sun damage with superfood actives that block pigment at the source.

    Hyperpigmentation comes in many forms: dark spots, sun spots, uneven tone...


    But they're all caused by the same thing: an overactive enzyme called tyrosinase that keeps producing melanin deep in your skin.


    These spots steal your confidence.


    They make you waste money on products that don't work.


    And they make you miss the clear, even skin you had 20 years ago.


    Here's the truth: fading dark spots doesn't have to take months or cost thousands.


    Superfood Soap works differently.


    It blocks tyrosinase at the source, so your skin physically can't make new dark spots.


    Unlike expensive serums, harsh peels, and laser treatments that only treat the surface (which is why spots always come back), this soap stops pigment production where it starts.


    The result?


    Visibly brighter skin for hundreds of women who tried everything else and failed.


    It's the simple, natural, and effective way to finally fade stubborn dark spots and reclaim the even, glowing skin you deserve.

    One Simple Bar. Years of Dark Spots Gone.

    Fade years of stubborn dark spots faster than any serum, cream, or treatment you've tried.

    “I am also a 56-yr-old who had terrible sun damage. I am 2 bars in and I can’t believe the results - I barely have a freckle. Mad at myself for not trying it sooner..”

    Linda K.

    Verified Customer

    The Science Behind Brighter, Spot-Free Skin

    A carefully formulated 3-Pillar Formula that blends effective botanicals, superfoods and clinical actives.

    BRIGHTENING BOTANICALS Kojic acid and turmeric block the enzyme creating dark spots at the source, stopping new pigment before it forms.

     

    SKIN SUPERFOODS Honey, shea butter, and olive oil nourish and repair your skin barrier so actives can penetrate deeper and work faster.

     

    CLINICAL ACTIVES Dermatologist-tested ingredients clinically proven to even tone and brighten without irritation or harsh side effects.

     

    Unlike serums that sit on the surface or treatments that damage your skin, this formula works with your body's natural repair process to fade spots gently & safely.

    Results You Love or Your Money Back

    91% of women see dramatic fading. If you're in the 9%, we'll give you a full refund.

    We proudly stand behind each purchase with a full money back guarantee.

    You either absolutely love your purchase because you see game changing results, or we'll give you a full refund, no questions asked.

    FAQ

    What kind of dark spots does it help with?

    Our Superfood Soap is made to support clearer, more even-looking skin. It helps fade the appearance of many types of discoloration including dark spots, sun spots, age spots, melasma, hyperpigmentation, and uneven tone anywhere on the face and body. With consistent use, the brightening botanicals and nourishing superfoods in the formula gently but quickly support healthy skin renewal for a brighter, more radiant and even-toned complexion.

    How do I use it?

    Use it twice a day to cleanse. Once in the morning, once at night.

     

    Rinse your face or the area you're targeting: then lather on the soap for 10 seconds and let the lather sit for 20 seconds before rinsing.

     

    Just make sure to moisturize after use, and use sunscreen if you're going outside.

    Is it safe for sensitive skin?

    Yes, our formula is free from harsh chemicals and synthetic fragrances. Many customers with sensitive or eczema-prone skin love it, but as with any new product, patch test first.

    Is it good for oily skin?

    You bet. Kojic Acid and Turmeric both help balance excess oil while improving the look of dark spots and blemishes. Coconut Oil (rich in lauric acid) and Lemon Oil work to cleanse away buildup and impurities, while the soap’s natural butters keep skin hydrated without feeling greasy. Unlike harsh cleansers that strip natural oils and trigger more oil production, this formula gently clarifies while maintaining a healthy skin barrier, making it a great daily choice for oily or combination skin.

    Can it help with acne?

    Absolutely. What makes this soap different is that it tackles acne on four levels at once. Coconut Oil fights the bacteria that cause breakouts, Turmeric calms redness and swelling, Kojic Acid stops dark scars from forming, and rich superfoods keep your skin barrier strong instead of stripped.     Yes! Our formula is gentle enough for daily use on the face and body. Just avoid direct contact with your eyes.

    Every skin type is different, but many customers notice changes within the 3-5 days, then even more significant improvements in as little as 7-14 days. For best results, we recommend daily use for 4–6 weeks, combined with sunscreen on exposed areas.

    Will it dry out my skin?

    Nope. Unlike many soaps, ours is enriched with Shea Butter, Coconut Oil, Mango Butter, and Olive Oil to deeply nourish and hydrate, leaving your skin soft and smooth after every wash.

    Keep the bar dry between uses (on a soap dish or rack) to extend its life and prevent melting.
